title: The Baratie’s Code Comes Into Focus
description: On pages 20–21, the crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s impulsiveness, Fullbody’s arrogance, and Sanji’s sharp code collide.
scene: The Baratie is loud, violent, and rule-bound: cooks fight like pirates, customers cause trouble, and Sanji’s character begins to emerge through conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Please enjoy the rest of your meals!

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: I don't know what to say...

dialogue.speaker: Zeff
dialogue.text: I've never had such delicious food...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I thought I was going to die...! I thought it was all over for me...!

summary: This part introduces the Baratie as more than a restaurant; it is a battlefield of pride, hunger, and harsh principles that will define Sanji’s arc.
